description:
You are a restaurant manager performing a menu audit. Navigate to the Floreant POS Back Office and create a text inventory report of the current menu configuration.

1. Access Back Office:
   - Click 'BACK OFFICE' on the main screen
   - Enter PIN: 1111
   - Navigate to the menu management section (e.g., Explorers -> Menu Items)

2. Review the menu structure and create a report file at `/home/ga/menu_inventory_report.txt` with the following information:
   - A list of ALL menu categories and the count of items in each
   - The TOTAL number of items in the system
   - The MOST EXPENSIVE item (Name and Price)
   - The LEAST EXPENSIVE item with price > $0 (Name and Price)

Expected Report Format:
